response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with genuine high-performance systems experience, but the core of this role is deep, current C++ expertise for industrial automation, and his professional C++ exposure amounts to a roughly seven-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 plus a university thesis. His recent decade is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js web platforms and DLang services, with no evidence of MQTT, industrial protocols, IEC 62443, or Secure Development Lifecycle practice. The transferable skills (concurrency, event-driven design, mentoring) are real but do not offset the missing core competency for a senior C++ position.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, caching) handling millions of requests per second
Event-driven architecture and distributed platform experience, including a self-built geo-data platform on Kubernetes
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, plus a track record of mentoring via workshops, dojos, and courses
concerns: Professional C++ experience is minimal and dated (~7 months in 2014-2015); C++ is absent from his skills list
No industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or IEC 62443 / SDL security exposure
Recent roles are web/full-stack TypeScript work, a significant domain shift from networked multi-threaded industrial C++ systems

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity or IoT protocol experience
